title: ceropteris tartarea
intro: Ceropteris tartarea, also known as the Mountain Fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayas and Southeast Asia. It is a medicinal plant with various health benefits, and its leaves and roots are used to prepare herbal remedies. The medicinal properties of Ceropteris tartarea include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory infections.
